item.translation_description: Low sensor damping factor - this will make the app jittery
Medium sensor damping factor - this will make the app slightly jittery
Really High sensor damping factor - this will make the app sluggish

string-array.name: viewing_direction
string-array.item: ขอบฟ้าหมุน

item.translation_description: Shows the sky as pointed at by the long edge of the phone

string-array.item: โหมดตัวชี้

string-array.name: auto_dim_texts

item.translation_description: Leave it on the system setting

string-array.item: ค่าเริ่มต้นของระบบ

item.translation_description: The setting used for the last 15 years
